resultList.dtldesc: Welcome to your future home at Godrej Tropical Isle, where luxury meets comfort in the heart of Sector 146, Noida. Nestled amidst lush greenery and offering a serene escape from the hustle and bustle of the city, this stunning 3 BHK flat awaits its new owner. With impeccable design, modern amenities, and a prime location, this property is not just a home, but a sanctuary where every moment is infused with tranquility and elegance.::::Property Specifications::::Welcome to this spacious 3 BHK flat spanning across 2550 square feet in the prestigious Godrej Tropical Isle, Sector 146, Noida. Boasting a vaastu-compliant design and facing the South-East direction, this residence on the 20th floor of a 35-floor tower offers panoramic views of the surroundings. With an unfurnished layout, it presents a canvas for you to personalize according to your taste and preferences.::::The property features 3 bedrooms, each accompanied by an attached western-style bathroom, ensuring convenience and privacy. Four balconies adorn the apartment, with two attached to bedrooms, one to the living room, and another situated in the kitchen area, offering delightful garden and road views.::::The living cum dining area provides ample space for entertainment and relaxation, while a servant room with a bathroom adds to the functionality of the home. The modular kitchen, complete with a chimney, is designed for both style and functionality, facilitating culinary endeavors. Additionally, a utility area attached to the kitchen enhances convenience in daily chores. The flooring throughout the apartment is adorned with marble, adding a touch of elegance to the ambiance.::::Facilities::::This property comes with covered parking, ensuring the safety and protection of your vehicle. Enjoy uninterrupted water supply round the clock, complemented by a power backup facility for convenience during outages. Your security is paramount, with the presence of vigilant security guards and CCTV surveillance installed throughout the premises. Additionally, lifts are available for easy access to all floors, ensuring a seamless living experience.::::Locality::::Conveniently located midway between Noida and Greater Noida, this property serves as a strategic landmark, providing easy access to both cities. Within a radius of 1 km, residents have access to esteemed educational institutions, healthcare facilities, and shopping destinations, ensuring a seamless lifestyle. Public transportation options, including buses and autos, are readily available, facilitating effortless commuting. Additionally, banks and ATMs are situated nearby, catering to your financial needs. For enhanced connectivity, the metro station is close by, offering swift access to various parts of the city.
